completed_tasks.name: State recorded after Phase 8 UI-SPEC approval

remaining_tasks.name: Verify, review, and run security/threat checks after implementation

human_actions_pending.action: Resume in a new session and start Phase 8 planning
human_actions_pending.context: The current session is intentionally paused before planning begins.

decisions.decision: Use native .codex GSD core and preserve original .planning artifacts
decisions.rationale: The bridge/runtime transition flow previously conflicted with the native planning schema.

decisions.decision: Phase 8 peek UI is visual-first and nearly metadata-free
decisions.rationale: User wants fast component viewing, not another crowded detail card.

decisions.decision: Filters must be extensible and generated from loaded itemSummaries
decisions.rationale: Hardcoded tiny filter lists and inconsistent route/sidebar groupings are not acceptable.

decisions.decision: Remove or demote verified item/high confidence UI noise
decisions.rationale: Those labels distract from component browsing and imply unsupported quality/confidence claims.

decisions.decision: Related browsing is a safe foundation for future production pattern upgrades
decisions.rationale: Phase 8 can connect similar patterns but must not claim better/best/correct until evidence exists.

context_notes: Phase 8 is paused after discussion and UI contract. No implementation plan exists yet. Start by reading 08-CONTEXT.md and 08-UI-SPEC.md, then plan Phase 8. Do not use bridge transition/state-next commands; use native .codex workflow files and .codex/gsd-core/bin/gsd-tools.cjs.
